subject: RegionGateSigil
adopted_concept: Hub and three-region gate sigils for readable region entrance, unlock, route, and save/continue UI cues.

asset_request.source: inferred because no visual asset_request.yaml was present in the checkout for this UI icon family
out_of_scope_asset_requests: Assets/Art/ModelRigAnimation/Enemy/MeleeShardling/SealedLockRelic_v0.1.0/asset_request.yaml is a model/rig animation request and was not used as this UI icon request.
asset_request.usage_context: FOURFOLD ECHOES hub gate, region unlock, route selection, save/continue region cue, and optional gate material/VFX atlas use

prompt_contract:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: Unity UI icon family plus 3D material atlas maps
Primary request: compact FOURFOLD ECHOES hub and three-region gate sigils, no text, no background
Style/medium: procedural 2D raster icon, folded reliquary miniature product line
Subject: four region gate sigils built from low folded slabs, fourfold inlays, chunky tabs, and one functional route signal thread
Composition/framing: centered silhouette, transparent padding, readable at 64px, 128px, and 256px
Color palette: ivory hub stone, moss-weathered R01, scorched amber-charcoal R02, cold violet-blue R03, shared warm gold inlays
Materials/textures: broad stylized PBR planes, sparse bevel-like normal detail, no photoreal grime, no noisy fantasy texture
Constraints: transparent PNG, no labels, no letters, no background plate, no cast shadow, variations differ by outline, socket, material temperature, and signal placement rather than color alone
Avoid: quest markers, map pins, generic elemental icons, inventory symbols, external IP style names, fine decorative clutter, text, watermark

unity_import.texture_type: Sprite (2D and UI) for individual icons; Default/Normal Map for atlas maps as needed

texture_maps.Mask_channels: R=silhouette/occlusion, G=material roughness group, B=emissive mask, A=alpha

variants.name: Hub
variants.difference: polished arch silhouette, open circular return socket, cool vertical route thread

variants.name: Region01
variants.difference: rounded weathered side tabs, leaf-like receiver socket, green left signal thread

variants.name: Region02
variants.difference: scorched bent lower tabs, ember receiver socket, amber lower hook thread

variants.name: Region03
variants.difference: cold sharp side tabs, diamond lens socket, split right-side signal thread

qc.edge_bleed: none detected in alpha-corner and edge checks after inset pass
qc.tile_seam: not applicable; icons and atlas, not loop tiles
